| 4 | `CLAUDE.md` key docs table references `docs/worktrees.md` | ✅ PASS | Key docs table includes `| .openstation/docs/worktrees.md | Worktree modes (primary vs linked) |` |

**All 4 items pass.** Task transitioned to `verified`.
